channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - insider-gaming.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for insider-gaming.com

item.title: Assassin’s Creed Netflix Series is Set in Ancient Rome
item.content:encoded:
New details have revealed the ancient Rome setting for the Assassin’s Creed live-action series for Netflix, along with new cast members.

Ubisoft and Netflix have been making constant cast announcements, and last time we were informed that the likes of Nabhaan Rizwan, Noomi Rapace, Claes Bang, Sean Harris, Ramzy Bedia, and Corrado Invernizzi were joining the mix. Now, more names have been attached with additional details on the series revealed.

Assassin’s Creed Netflix Series Will Explore 64 A.D. Rome

According to a report by Variety, the upcoming Assassin’s Creed live-action series for Netflix will feature an original story set in Rome in 64 A.D. New cast members include Louis McCartney, Mirren Mack, Youssef Kerkour, and Sandra Guldberg-Kampp. The series will be shot entirely in Italy and will be based at Cinecittà Studios. Filming for the series began on March 9 and is expected to continue until October 16. The series is set to premiere on Netflix in 2027.

The report also states that in 64 A.D., the Great Fire of Rome broke out, lasted six days, and damaged or destroyed more than half of the city. Emperor Nero was blamed for this disaster, which gives us some idea of the kind of characters we could expect in the series or what the plot might be about. However, this is just speculation, and players should wait for official confirmation from Ubisoft or Netflix to know for sure.

In other news, they have brought on an Euphoria star as the lead and will feature Chernobyl’s director at the helm. Additionally, Ubisoft has confirmed that Assassin’s Creed Jade is currently in development. What are your thoughts on the Assassin’s Creed Netflix series being set in ancient Rome? Leave your thoughts down in the comments, and join the official Insider Gaming Discord server.

For more information from Insider Gaming, read about Savvy Group acquiring Moonton studio for over $6 billion. Don’t forget to sign up for our weekly newsletter.

item.title: Fortnite Chapter 7 Season 2 Dread Punisher Squibbly Boss Location—Where to Find & All Loot
item.content:encoded:
A slew of new content has arrived in Fortnite with the jump into Chapter 7 Season 2, and Dread Punisher Squibbly is one of the bosses to track down and eliminate.

Squibbly is a significant character this season, with skins available in the Battle Pass and a POI themed around the character, and the Dread Punisher variant can put up a formidable fight.

If you’re on the hunt for Dread Punisher Squibbly or want to know what loot drops are available, Insider Gaming has all the details.

Where to Find Dread Punisher Squibbly in Fortnite Chapter 7 Season 2

Like the other bosses in Fortnite Chapter 7 Season 2, Dread Punisher Squibbly does not have a specific spawn location. Instead, there are a variety of areas he can appear.

Unsurprisingly, given the name, the most common area to find the Dread Punisher Squibbly boss is around Squibbly Shores, but the boss can also be found in other areas.

If you’re on the hunt for Dread Punisher Squibbly, make sure to also check Ripped Tides, including the docks at the south of the POI, and Battlewood Boulevard.

  • More Insider Gaming: Should You Choose Team Ice King or Team Foundation?

While it can be frustrating to check all the potential spawn locations for Dread Punisher Squibbly, the variety of spawn locations helps to keep matches fresh, rather than a horde of players all landing at one specific spot.

Remember, the boss marker won’t appear on the minimap until you are within close proximity to Dread Punisher Squibbly, so you won’t be able to mark his exact location from a far distance.

Additionally, Dread Punisher Squibbly can be hard to spot with his stealth tech, so keep a close eye on his glowing purple cloak.

All Dread Punisher Squibbly Loot Drops in Fortnite Chapter 7 Season 2

The prized reward for eliminating the Dread Punisher Squibbly boss in Fortnite Chapter 7 Season 2 is a Mythic version of the Combat Assault Rifle.

The Mythic variant of the weapon has an increased fire rate and damage, making it a real asset when coming toe-to-toe with enemies. Additionally, as it’s a Mythic, there’s only one of these available each game, so it can really give you an edge.

  • More Insider Gaming: All Fortnite Chapter 7 Season 2 NPC Locations & Services

Like other bosses, defeating Dread Punisher Squibbly also provides a chunk of ammunition for Assault Rifles, and some Shields to top yourself up on any you lost during the battle.

The loot pool for the bosses could change throughout the course of Chapter 7 Season 2 in Fortnite, so keep your eyes peeled for any alterations.

What are your impressions of Fortnite Chapter 7 Season 2? Share your verdict of the season in the Insider Gaming Discord.

For more Fortnite, read about two WWE wrestlers said to be coming to the game, and find out how to drive the Battle Bus.

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

item.title: Fortnite Chapter 7 Season 2 Ice King Echo Boss Location—Where to Find & All Loot
item.content:encoded:
Fortnite’s seasonal change has come with the standard refresh of content, including a new batch of bosses to find, and the Ice King is one of the characters ready to challenge in Chapter 7 Season 2.

Ice King plays a huge part in the season, with players asked to choose between his side or the side of the Foundation, and a slew of additional content will be introduced to the game as the season progresses and each side furthers progression to meet specific goals.

If you’re on the hunt for the Ice King in Fortnite Chapter 7 Season 2 and want to know what loot is available, Insider Gaming has all the details.

Where to Find Ice King in Fortnite Chapter 7 Season 2

As has become the norm in Fortnite, the Ice King does not have a fixed spawn location in Chapter 7 Season 2, and can instead be encountered in several locations.

While this can be frustrating if you’re hunting down the boss for a specific quest or for a particular piece of loot, it helps to make each match more varied, reducing the likelihood of a swarm of players all descending upon the same landing spot.

The best place to search for the Ice King is, unsurprisingly, around Frigid Fortress. However, while the boss can be located within the POI itself, make sure to check the surrounding areas. With the Ice King, pretty much any area on the map covered in snow is a possible spawn location.

More Insider Gaming: Should You Choose Team Ice King or Team Foundation?

A minimap icon won’t appear until you’re within close proximity to the Ice King, but he should be easier to spot from a distance, particularly as he will always be accompanied by Lady Windfrost.

Make sure you’re well prepared for a battle against Ice King, as Lady Windfrost will also engage in combat if you shoot either of them, or get too close to the pair.

It’s wise to focus on eliminating Lady Windfrost first, as she is equipped with Chug Splashes and will heal the Ice King, and taking her out of the equation removes that healing aspect.

All Ice King Loot Drops in Fortnite Chapter 7 Season 2

The biggest draw to defeating the Ice King in Fortnite Chapter 7 Season 2 is obtaining the Mythic Ice Gauntlets, but they’re not activated in-game yet.

The Mythic Ice Gauntlets will be available when Team Ice King has reached a specified point this season, which may take a fair while. You can, however, track progress on the Showdown page within Fortnite or on the webpage.

  • More Insider Gaming: All Fortnite Chapter 7 Season 2 NPC Locations & Services

Before the Mythic Ice Gauntlets are added to the loot pool, defeating the Ice King provides a Self Revive, Gold Bars, and ammunition, while Lady Windfrost drops a weapon and some Shield items.

The loot pool for the bosses is already confirmed to be changing as the season progresses, with new items unlocked, and we’ll be keeping this page updated with all the details.

What are your impressions of Fortnite Chapter 7 Season 2? Share your verdict of the season in the Insider Gaming Discord.

For more Fortnite, read about two WWE wrestlers said to be coming to the game, and find out how to drive the Battle Bus.

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android

item.title: Fortnite Chapter 7 Season 2 Dark Voyager Echo Boss Location—Where to Find & All Loot
item.content:encoded:
A new season in Fortnite means fresh bosses to hunt down and eliminate to secure some unique loot, and the Dark Voyager Echo is one of the bosses to challenge in Chapter 7 Season 2.

The Dark Voyager is a key player in the Chapter overall, having taken out the Battle Bus at the start of last season, and looks set to stay for the long-term. Now, his Echo can be challenged in the current season.

If you’re on the hunt for the Dark Voyager Echo and want to know where to look, and the available loot, Insider Gaming has you covered.

Where to Find Dark Voyager Echo in Fortnite Chapter 7 Season 2

The Dark Voyager Echo does not have a single set spawn in Fortnite Chapter 7 Season 2, instead having a broader area where they can be encountered.

In recent seasons, Fortnite has moved towards roaming bosses with a variety of different spawn locations, rather than one specific area where they can be found.

Although this can be irritating if you’re hunting down the boss for a specific quest or to secure loot, it makes matches more varied and reduces the likelihood of a flood of players immediately landing on the boss’s location.

  • More Insider Gaming: Should You Choose Team Ice King or Team Foundation?

The best place to hunt for the Dark Voyager Echo is around Dark Dominion. While the boss can spawn in the POI itself, check the surrounding areas for the character too, as there’s a variety of specific locations where it can appear.

Remember, a boss marker won’t appear on your minimap until you’re within close proximity to the Dark Voyager Echo, so keep your eyes peeled.

All Dark Voyager Echo Loot Drops in Fortnite Chapter 7 Season 2

The main benefit of defeating the Dark Voyager Echo is the Dark Voyager’s Obliterator, a Mythic version of the Chaos Reloader Shotgun.

The Mythic weapon variant has double the ammunition capacity of the standard version, which can be a life-saver in battles, and, of course, deals additional damage to enemies when fired.

  • More Insider Gaming: All Fortnite Chapter 7 Season 2 NPC Locations & Services

Other loot drops are weaker to previous bosses in the past, as they appear to be limited to just a Shield Potion and a slew of ammunition for the shotgun.

The loot pool for the Dark Voyager Echo boss could be adjusted as the season progresses, however, particularly with leaks indicating the Dark Voyager himself will be a boss to battle later in the season.

What are your impressions of Fortnite Chapter 7 Season 2? Share your verdict of the season in the Insider Gaming Discord.

For more Fortnite, read about two WWE wrestlers said to be coming to the game, and find out how to drive the Battle Bus.

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

item.title: Savvy Group to Acquire Mobile Legends: Bang Bang Studio for Over $6 Billion
item.content:encoded:
Savvy Group has signed a deal with ByteDance to acquire Mobile Legends: Bang Bang studio, Moonton, for over $6 billion.

A report from last month stated that ByteDance was preparing to sell the Moonton studio for between $6 billion and $7 billion, with Saudi Arabia’s Public Investment Fund-owned Savvy Games as the supposed buyer. We have now received confirmation that the deal is almost complete.

Saudi’s Savvy Group Signs Deal to Acquire Moonton from ByteDance

A report by Nikkei Asia reveals that ByteDance and Savvy Games have “signed an agreement and the completion of the deal will be subject to regulatory approvals”, which will make the latter the new owner of Moonton. The CEO of Moonton has stated that the new acquisition will provide them with “broader development opportunities” to help bring a “better gameplay experience to more players around the world.”

A ByteDance spokesperson has also commented on the transaction, stating, “This transaction marks a natural next step in its journey.” While the CEO of Savvy Games, Brian Ward, stated:

“This acquisition directly supports Savvy’s purpose to enable prosperity and connection through play for generations to come, and our mission to drive long-term growth and innovation in games and esports. Once completed, it will further strengthen our leadership in mobile games, deepen our talent pool, expand our global footprint, and enhance our reach across esports.”

Moonton Studio is the developer of Mobile Legends: Bang Bang, which is among the top 10 mobile gaming titles and a significant player in the esports scene. The game boasts approximately 110 million monthly active users and has been downloaded over 1.5 billion times, making it one of the biggest mobile games available today.

In other news, Saudi Arabia’s Electronic Gaming Development Company has acquired a 5% stake in Capcom. What are your thoughts on Savvy Group purchasing Moonton from ByteDance? Leave your thoughts down in the comments, and join the official Insider Gaming Discord server.

For more information from Insider Gaming, read about Escape from Tarkov developers teasing a new weapon that everyone wants. Don’t forget to sign up for our weekly newsletter.

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android

item.title: War in the Middle East causes Saudi Org to Miss Valorant Challengers EMEA
item.content:encoded:
Stallions Esports will miss Valorant Challengers 2026 EMEA Stage 1 due to travel restrictions imposed due to the ongoing conflict in the Middle East.

Riot Games announced the news, updating the community on the effects on the event, stating that “all matches involving Stallions Esports will be considered null and void,” adding that the schedule will be “brought forward to fill empty match slots.”

Stallion Esports to miss Valorant Challengers EMEA Stage 1

The 2026 Iran War started on February 28, severely affecting travel in the Middle East with airspace closed across several nations, and heavily restricted in Saudi Arabia.

Stallion Esports is headquartered in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia. The Valorant roster features two members from the org’s home nation, Othman ‘AL7B’ Khalid Al-Amoudi and in-game leader Abdulaziz ‘Avvix’ Alghanmi.

The roster also features two players from the United Arab Emirates, Omar ‘Koji’ Hraiz and Saif ‘Akai’ Alnuaimi. UAE airspace has faced full closures due to ongoing attacks.

The six-man roster also features Anas ‘Br1ckzi’ Bassem from Jordan and Russia’s Akhmed ‘Susano’ Markhiev.

The roster qualified for Valorant Challengers EMEA by winning the MENA Resilience Kickoff 2026, but will ultimately miss the event. Riot, however, did qualify that the roster will still be awarded a Challengers EMEA ranking point for qualifying for the event.

Riot Games Stallion Esports statement in full:

“Unfortunately, due to the ongoing situation in the Middle East and resulting travel restrictions, Stallions Esports will no longer participate in VALORANT Challengers EMEA 2026 Tournament #1.

“Stallions Esports will not be replaced in the competition and all matches involving Stallions Esports will be considered null and void. The team will still receive a Challengers EMEA ranking point for qualifying for the competition.

“The schedule will be adjusted accordingly, with affected fixtures from the same feed brought forward to fill open match slots.

“We thank Stallions Esports for their cooperation under these circumstances and extend our best wishes to the team’s players, staff, and their families during this time.”

For esports discussion, check out Insider Gaming’s Discord.

For more Riot-related news, did you see that Riot has confirmed that the LEC will stay in Berlin in 2027?

Darragh is an Esports Journalist for Insider Gaming specialising in Counter-Strike. He loves to explore how esports teams work, or why they very often do not.

More from Darragh Harbinson

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android



https://insider-gaming.com/war-in-the-middle-east-causes-saudi-org-to-miss-valorant-challengers-emea/

item.title: NYT Mini Crossword Hints Today—Answers For Friday, March 20
item.content:encoded:
The NYT Mini Crossword is a popular, quick-to-complete word game to test yourself daily, but some of the puzzles can be difficult to complete, so here are some hints.

If you’ve found yourself stuck on today’s NYT Mini, Insider Gaming has some helpful hints and all the answers for the NYT Mini Crossword on Friday, March 20, 2026.

IMPORTANT: The following information includes spoilers on today’s edition of the NYT Mini Crossword. If you don’t want the answer given to you, stop scrolling.

How to Play NYT Mini Crossword

The NYT Mini Crossword is available to play on the New York Times Games app or website, but, as of September 2025, a New York Times Game subscription is required.

The NYT Games Subscription is priced at $6.95 per month, but there are introductory offers available for other NYT subscriptions that include games access, which might be worth considering.

Without a Games subscription, access to the NYT Mini Crossword is blocked.

NYT Mini Crossword Clues (March 20)

Here are all the clues provided for the NYT Mini Crossword for March 20, 2026.

Across

1 – Cable channel that airs March Madness games

4 – Rapper with the 2026 #1 album ‘The Fall-Off’

6 – Review thoroughly, as taxes

7 – “Darn it!”

8 – Annoying thing to realize you’ve left in the house

Down

1 – Yesterday, tomorrow

2 – Radar screen dots

3 – “On your marks, get ___”

4 – Playing card historically called a knave

5 – Medical success

Additional Clues For NYT Mini (March 20)

Across

1 – Tablespoonful, in cooking instructions

4 – ‘Middle Child’ rapper

6 – Inspection of accounts

7 – Slang for poo, manure

8 – Piano part to press

Down

1 – This exact day

2 – Minor mistakes

3 – A collection

4 – Friend of Jill in popular nursery rhyme

5 – Heal

All NYT Mini Crossword Answers (March 20)

Here are all the answers for the NYT Mini Crossword on March 20, 2026.

Across

1 – TBS

4 – JCOLE

6 – AUDIT

7 – CRAP

8 – KEYS

Down

1 – TODAY

2 – BLIPS

3 – SET

4 – JACK

5 – CURE

When is The Next Game?

The NYT Mini Crossword refreshes daily at 10 PM ET on weekdays and Saturdays, and at 6 PM ET on Sundays.

As such, the next NYT Mini Crossword will be available at 7 PM PT/9 PM CT/10 PM ET/3 AM GMT/2 PM AET.

What is The NYT Mini Crossword?

The NYT Mini Crossword was introduced in 2014 as a shorter and quicker-to-complete game to accompany the main New York Times Crossword, which was initially released in 1942.

Until September 2025, the NYT Mini Crossword was free, but it has now been consolidated into a monthly NYT Games Subscription alongside several other popular games.

Did you struggle with the NYT Mini Crossword today? Share your thoughts in the Insider Gaming Discord.

For more word games, check out hints and answers for today’s Contexto, and take a look at today’s NYT Connections.

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android



https://insider-gaming.com/nyt-mini-crossword-hints-march-19-2/
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Escape from Tarkov Devs Tease New Weapon That Sends Fans Wild
item.content:encoded:
Escape from Tarkov is a gun nut’s dream, in many ways. The game, which isn’t exactly a milsim title, leans heavily into realism, promoting authentic weapon handling, ballistics, customization, and durability. It’s not the most intricate thing out there, and you can still do some kooky things with the game’s arsenal, but it’s pretty far up the realism scale.

Recently, Nikita Buyanov, the head of the studio at Battlestate Games, teased a new weapon for Escape from Tarkov that sent fans into a frenzy, simply because of how many of them genuinely want it.

Is The G3 Coming to Tarkov?

In a post on social media, Nikita Buyanov, who is effectively the face of Escape from Tarkov, showcased a simple, side-on shot of a Heckler & Koch G3 ‘battle rifle’. The weapon is tried and tested across the gaming space and has found a spot in many top-tier shooters over the years, but it has never arrived in Escape from Tarkov.

Under the post, fans started expressing their enjoyment at the ‘announcement.’ However, it’s important to temper your expectations, as not everything that Nikita posts makes it into the Escape from Tarkov ecosystem. In an interview given some time ago, the team at Battlestate revealed that it can take months to fully flesh out a new Escape from Tarkov weapon, so just hold your horses.

Many Tarkov fans are gun nuts, and in the comments under the image, they posted shots of their own, real-world G3 rifles, declaring that they’d finally have the chance to build a digital replication in Escape from Tarkov.

One user shared a trip down memory lane:

can’t wait to get this beauty… was trained with it when i was in the Bundeswehr (German Army). She was heavy & noisy, but acted like an AK (operating well while covered in dirt). If you are lucky to get a good one, she was accurate AF too.

And, of course, many users took it upon themselves to bombard Nikita with requests for weapons they’d love to see added to Escape from Tarkov. At this point, the game is fast becoming bloated, and some weapons simply aren’t viable, but it’s nice to have a plethora of choices.

Would you like to see the G3 rifle added to Escape from Tarkov? Let us know what you’re thinking on the Insider Gaming Discord server.

For more Insider Gaming coverage, check out the news that a free gacha game infected players with malware

Senior Editor and Esports Lead

Grant has been gaming for 30+ years and in the industry for 10+. You'll probably find him playing a post-apocalyptic game or an extraction shooter somewhere.

More from Grant Taylor-Hill

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android



https://insider-gaming.com/escape-from-tarkov-new-weapon-devs/

item.title: ARC Raiders Flashpoint Release Date & Start Time—All Content, Explained
item.content:encoded:
Embark Studios revealed its early 2026 plans for ARC Raiders at the start of the year, and it’s already almost time for the third big update: Flashpoint.

Fans have already enjoyed the two prior updates, with Headwinds offering a smaller release back in January, whilst Shrouded Sky introduced the new Hurricane Map Condition, as well as two entirely new ARC enemies to battle.

However, Flashpoint is set to up the ante in ARC Raiders once again, and you won’t have to wait long to explore what it has to offer.

When Does Flashpoint Release In ARC Raiders?

Embark Studios has confirmed that the Flashpoint update will arrive in ARC Raiders on March 31, 2026.

It’s been the case that the updates have arrived towards the back end of the month, but this is as far back as a March update could go! Still, the wait is almost over, and based on what was revealed in the original roadmap, it could turn out to be an update worth waiting for.

  • More Insider Gaming: ARC Raiders Map Condition Schedule

Flashpoint is expected to launch at the usual update times for ARC Raiders, but in case you’re unfamiliar with those, Insider Gaming has them listed below in a variety of time zones for your convenience.

All Flashpoint Confirmed Content For ARC Raiders

As announced with the roadmap, four new pieces of content can be expected to drop with the Flashpoint update for ARC Raiders.

These are the following:

  • New Map Condition
  • New ARC Threat
  • Player Project
  • Scrappy Update

As for the finer details, Embark Studios is only just beginning to drip-feed teasers, with official information still a few days out. However, that doesn’t stop the community from speculating, and the small symbols on the roadmap give some clues as to what to expect.

The new Map Condition and ARC Threat are bound to be the highlights of the update. Judging by the symbol, the new Map Condition seems to be lightning-related, which is odd considering the existence of the Electromagnetic Storm. When combined with the title, Flashpoint, perhaps there are some blinding effects that take place?

  • More Insider Gaming: How To Solve The Controlled Access Zone Button Puzzle In ARC Raiders

As for the new ARC, rumours run thin. Fingers crossed that it’s not another variation of pre-existing ARC, like the Firefly and Comet were, as it’d be great to see some entirely new threats to face on the Rust Belt.

The other two updates seem pretty standard. A new Project will undoubtedly see you collecting more resources in return for a slew of rewards, but the Scrappy Update sounds vague enough that it’s interesting. Is it simply a rework of how he collects resources, or is it the addition of a new system?

Only time will tell, but as soon as new information arrives, Insider Gaming will update this article with the latest and greatest details, so stick around.

Are you excited for the Flashpoint update in ARC Raiders? Share your thoughts in the official Insider Gaming Discord Server.

For more ARC Raiders content, check out the complete Surgeon Deck, as well as the news that ARC Raiders was silently recording your Discord DMs.

MOBILE APP
